description_long: This is a rustic, stylized wooden mug with a cylindrical body constructed from vertical wooden staves, each showing pronounced grain and chiseled edges. Two wide, metallic bands encircle the mug horizontally, fastened with large, round rivets, reinforcing its structure. The handle is thick and robust, made from the same wood as the body, and is wrapped with a leather strap for added grip and comfort. The wood appears weathered and slightly uneven, giving the mug a hand-crafted, medieval tavern aesthetic. The interior is visible and appears hollow, suitable for holding liquids. The overall finish is matte with some roughness, and the object exudes a sense of durability and functionality.
description: A rugged, hand-crafted wooden mug reinforced with metal bands and a leather-wrapped handle, featuring a weathered, medieval look.
description_view_0: The mug is shown at an angle highlighting the thick, leather-wrapped handle and the detailed wood grain, with both metal bands and rivets clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view presents the mug from the front, focusing on the cylindrical wooden body and the two metal bands, with the handle mostly hidden.
description_view_2: The mug is seen from the opposite side of the handle, displaying the wood texture, metal bands, and a partial view of the handle's attachment.
description_view_3: The handle is centered in this view, showing the full extent of the leather wrapping and the back seam of the mug, with the metal bands partially visible.
